mapper.insert: INSERT INTO financehub.refresh_tokens (user_id, token_hash, family, expires_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{tokenHash}, #{family}::uuid, #{expiresAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, token_hash AS tokenHash, family, expires_at AS expiresAt, revoked, created_at AS createdAt FROM financehub.refresh_tokens WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash}
mapper.update: UPDATE financehub.refresh_tokens SET revoked = TRUE WHERE family = #{family}::uuid
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM financehub.refresh_tokens WHERE expires_at < NOW()
